---
title: "Subset fusion files for Rare CNS"
output: html_notebook
author: "Aylar Babaei"
date: 2026
---
### Setup

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

# Look for git root folder
root_dir <- rprojroot::find_root(rprojroot::has_dir(".git"))

# Get subset folder
subset_dir <- file.path(
  root_dir,
  "analyses",
  "molecular-subtyping-Rare-CNS",
  "rare-cns-subset"
)
```

### Input

```{r}
# Load Rare CNS RNA biospecimens identified in 01
rare_cns_rna_df <- readr::read_tsv(
  file.path(subset_dir, "RareCNS_rna_biospecimen.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

# Load putative oncogenic fusion table
fusion_tbl <- readr::read_tsv(
  file.path(root_dir, "data", "fusion-putative-oncogenic.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)
```

## filtering fusion table for Rare CNS RNA biospecimens
```{r}
# Keep only Rare CNS RNA biospecimens

rare_cns_fusions <- fusion_tbl %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    rare_cns_rna_df %>% dplyr::select(Kids_First_Biospecimen_ID, match_id),
    by = c("Sample" = "Kids_First_Biospecimen_ID")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(match_id))


# Create a column with all genes involved in the fusion

fusion_genes <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      all_genes = purrr::pmap_chr(
        list(Gene1A, Gene2A, Gene1B, Gene2B),
        ~ paste(stats::na.omit(c(...)), collapse = "|")
      )
    )
}

rare_cns_fusions <- fusion_genes(rare_cns_fusions)

#Flag hallmark Rare CNS fusion classes

rare_cns_fusion_subset <- rare_cns_fusions %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    MN1_BEND2_fus = dplyr::case_when(
      stringr::str_detect(all_genes, "\\bMN1\\b") &
        stringr::str_detect(all_genes, "\\bBEND2\\b") ~ "Yes",
      TRUE ~ "No"
    ),
    MN1_CXXC5_fus = dplyr::case_when(
      stringr::str_detect(all_genes, "\\bMN1\\b") &
        stringr::str_detect(all_genes, "\\bCXXC5\\b") ~ "Yes",
      TRUE ~ "No"
    ),
    BCOR_fus = dplyr::case_when(
      stringr::str_detect(all_genes, "\\bBCOR\\b") ~ "Yes",
      TRUE ~ "No"
    ),
    CIC_fus = dplyr::case_when(
      stringr::str_detect(all_genes, "\\bCIC\\b") ~ "Yes",
      TRUE ~ "No"
    ),
    PATZ1_fus = dplyr::case_when(
      stringr::str_detect(all_genes, "\\bPATZ1\\b") ~ "Yes",
      TRUE ~ "No"
    ),
    PLAGL1_fus = dplyr::case_when(
      stringr::str_detect(all_genes, "\\bPLAGL1\\b") ~ "Yes",
      TRUE ~ "No"
    ),
    BRD4_LEUTX_fus = dplyr::case_when(
      stringr::str_detect(all_genes, "\\bBRD4\\b") &
        stringr::str_detect(all_genes, "\\bLEUTX\\b") ~ "Yes",
      TRUE ~ "No"
    ),
    EWS_fus = dplyr::case_when(
      FusionName %in% c("EWSR1--FLI1", "FLI1--EWSR1") ~ "Yes",
      TRUE ~ "No"
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    Sample,
    match_id,
    FusionName,
    Gene1A, Gene2A, Gene1B, Gene2B,
    Fusion_Type,
    CalledBy,
    caller.count,
    reciprocal_exists,
    MN1_BEND2_fus,
    MN1_CXXC5_fus,
    BCOR_fus,
    CIC_fus,
    PATZ1_fus,
    PLAGL1_fus,
    BRD4_LEUTX_fus,
    EWS_fus
  ) %>%
  dplyr::rename(Kids_First_Biospecimen_ID = Sample)

# one row per biospecimen

rare_cns_fusion_summary <- rare_cns_fusion_subset %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Kids_First_Biospecimen_ID, match_id) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    MN1_BEND2_fus = if_else(any(MN1_BEND2_fus == "Yes"), "Yes", "No"),
    MN1_CXXC5_fus = if_else(any(MN1_CXXC5_fus == "Yes"), "Yes", "No"),
    BCOR_fus = if_else(any(BCOR_fus == "Yes"), "Yes", "No"),
    CIC_fus = if_else(any(CIC_fus == "Yes"), "Yes", "No"),
    PATZ1_fus = if_else(any(PATZ1_fus == "Yes"), "Yes", "No"),
    PLAGL1_fus = if_else(any(PLAGL1_fus == "Yes"), "Yes", "No"),
    BRD4_LEUTX_fus = if_else(any(BRD4_LEUTX_fus == "Yes"), "Yes", "No"),
    EWS_fus = if_else(any(EWS_fus == "Yes"), "Yes", "No"),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

```
## Write outputs
```{r}
# Save detailed fusion rows
readr::write_tsv(
  rare_cns_fusion_subset,
  file.path(subset_dir, "RareCNS_fusion_details.tsv")
)

# Save biospecimen-level fusion summary
readr::write_tsv(
  rare_cns_fusion_summary,
  file.path(subset_dir, "RareCNS_fusion_subset.tsv")
)
```

## Summary

```{r}
rare_cns_fusion_summary %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    MN1_BEND2_fus = sum(MN1_BEND2_fus == "Yes"),
    MN1_CXXC5_fus = sum(MN1_CXXC5_fus == "Yes"),
    BCOR_fus = sum(BCOR_fus == "Yes"),
    CIC_fus = sum(CIC_fus == "Yes"),
    PATZ1_fus = sum(PATZ1_fus == "Yes"),
    PLAGL1_fus = sum(PLAGL1_fus == "Yes"),
    BRD4_LEUTX_fus = sum(BRD4_LEUTX_fus == "Yes"),
    EWS_fus = sum(EWS_fus == "Yes")
  )

```

## Session Info

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
